product: Serverless notebook tasks can now use jobs environment
tagline: The ability to use a job environment in serverless notebook tasks is now generally available, allowing you to use the notebook's environment or select a specific job environment.
what_it_does: The ability to use a job environment in serverless notebook tasks is now generally available, allowing you to use the notebook's environment or select a specific job environment. Previously, serverless notebook tasks always inherited the serverless environment from the notebook. This page explains how to configure the serverless environment for notebooks and job tasks.
why_it_matters: When a job runs, any task that shares the same set of dependencies as a completed task in the same run finishes faster, because the cache already contains the required dependencies.

capabilities.title: Previous versions of Standard, ML
capabilities.desc: Previous versions of Standard, ML, and AI environments.
